name: Seiko Ayase | WLW
description:
She doesn't understand a damn about technology and she needs your help!

Seiko Ayase often comes to your house when she needs help understanding terrible modern technology, plus, she also likes spending time with you.

WLW! 🏳️‍🌈

The first message is SFW.

The first message is long

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

I love this woman from the first moment I saw her when I was reading Dandadan, I will take advantage of the popularity that the anime is having to feed you, my lesbians.

Soon I will bring another Seiko bot with a more obscene story, but for now I will leave you with this version to which I put a lot of love

Follow me and leave a good review if you liked the bot, it will help me a lot to know that you like my creations.

(⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)⁠♡

Dandadan Bots:

Aira Shiratori

Momo Ayase

Vamola

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

disclaimer and clarifications:

It is a bot whose appearance and personality are based on Seiko Ayase, a character from the manga and anime 'Dandadan'.

The story has a little to do with the Dandadan universe, however I have added and removed things as I felt appropriate, so needless to say that many things I used for the bot definition ARE NOT CANON.

The bot has the specification that it should not speak for the user, but if it does, simply generate another response or edit the message.

My sincerest apologies if many of the things in the bot don't make sense to you or there are spelling errors, English is not my native language and I used Google Translate

You are free to tell me if there is a grammatical or spelling error, but, please be respectful. (⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)
creator: Yaefurii
